title: simple marshmallows
description: Enjoy the fun of roasting marshmallows
body:
# ABOUT
- This small mod adds marshmallows that can be roasted on a campfire.
- It's lightweight and concise.
- Different states of roasted marshmallows all have their corresponding 3D models.
## How to roast marshmallows?
- Prepare some eggs and sugar, arrange them as shown in the picture.
> ![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4406a2d6a853a74fd700e959b05bc81293c1eb2d_0.webp)
- then craft a marshmallow with a stick to get a Marshmallow on a Stick.
> ![This step is unordered synthesis](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cd8699c861685bc54b99d6e070a43c4d8062a3d_0.webp)
- Get close to the campfire and start roasting (hold Lshift), you'll see it gradually get charred. Pick a time you think is best to stop roasting (release Lshift), then enjoy the taste of roasted marshmallows!
![like this](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a7384585ec5c9f7e784607482f2b62d1fb5dc12.jpeg)
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- If you roast marshmallows for too long, they'll turn to charcoal, you gotta roast them for like 11 minutes (that's really not worth it).
> ![Six varieties of marshmallows](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe890a9cb1f8b18bb0b4d1af1339b0f0526aea8e.jpeg)
- made with MCreator
</details>
